title: NVIDIA Nemotron Reasoning Challenge
shortDesc: Kaggle competition on few-shot rule induction. Built a solver-distilled curriculum of 21,311 verified examples to fine-tune Nemotron-3-Nano with LoRA.
description: Kaggle competition on few-shot rule induction across 6 reasoning problem types (bit manipulation, physics gravity, unit conversion, numeral systems, symbol transform, encryption ciphers). Approach: a solver-distilled curriculum of verified teacher examples used to fine-tune NVIDIA's Nemotron-3-Nano with LoRA. The physics-gravity generator was not observed in the public competitor notebooks reviewed.

Built deterministic per-type solvers and generated 21,311 curated training records across 5 of the 6 problem types. Round-trip re-verification caught errors in the synthetic generators. A rank-32 LoRA training pipeline was implemented for the 30B model, targeting Kaggle's vLLM inference backend.
imageAlt: NVIDIA Nemotron Reasoning Challenge — solver-distilled curriculum feeding a LoRA adapter

title: CV RAG System – HR Assistant
shortDesc: Learning-focused RAG pipeline for CV / PDF understanding and Q&A: parsing, embeddings, vector storage, and natural-language querying.
description: Learning-focused project exploring Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for document understanding and question answering. Built an end-to-end pipeline for PDF parsing, embeddings, vector storage, and natural language querying.

title: Cloud Market Intelligence Agent
shortDesc: Freelance project. B2B AI agent generating scheduled competitive-intelligence digests via Claude API, with Telegram delivery and GitHub audit trail.
description: Freelance project. B2B AI agent generating scheduled weekly and monthly competitive-intelligence digests for the cloud-services market. Pipeline: cron scheduler → Claude API analysis → quality gates (TL;DR, length, citations) → Telegram delivery + GitHub audit trail. 3-layer architecture: analysis logic / Python runtime (scheduler + bot + HTTP daemon) / Docker deployment.
imageAlt: Cloud Market Intelligence Agent — scheduled pipeline from cron to Telegram delivery

title: Fruit Classification (Thesis)
shortDesc: YOLOv4-based computer vision pipeline to classify fruits by ripeness using color analysis. Final year thesis (2020).
description: Final year thesis (2020): built a YOLOv4-based computer vision pipeline to classify fruits by ripeness (green vs. ripe) using color analysis. Designed for agricultural sorting simulation. Implemented with Python, OpenCV, and deep learning training from scratch on a custom dataset.
imageAlt: Fruit ripeness classification stages: Unripe, Breaker, Turning, Ripe

links.label: Thesis Project — repository not yet public

title: Football Data Analysis & Prediction
shortDesc: Sports data analysis using historical football match data (2018–2022). Feature engineering and exploratory statistical analysis.
description: Sports data analysis project using historical football match data (2018–2022). Focused on feature engineering and exploratory statistical analysis to understand predictive patterns.

title: AI Teaching Assistant
shortDesc: Learning project combining RAG with LLMs for educational Q&A using Google Gemini API and grounding techniques.
description: Learning project combining RAG with Large Language Models for educational question answering using Google Gemini API and grounding techniques.

title: COVID-19 Global Data Analysis
shortDesc: SQL-based exploration of global COVID-19 datasets with Tableau visualizations of cases, deaths, and vaccinations.
description: SQL-based exploration of global COVID-19 datasets, focusing on trends in cases, deaths, and vaccinations with Tableau visualizations.

title: Tic Tac Toe AI (Minimax)
shortDesc: Classic game AI implementing Minimax with Alpha-Beta pruning to explore decision trees and adversarial search.
description: Classic game AI implementing the Minimax algorithm with Alpha-Beta pruning to explore decision trees and adversarial search.

title: Python OOP – Card Game
shortDesc: OOP practice implementing a classic card game ("War"). Focused on clean class design, inheritance, and encapsulation.
description: Object-Oriented Programming practice project implementing a classic card game ("War"). Focused on clean class design, inheritance, encapsulation, and game state management.
